title: Independent Transfer: Publish an Evacuation Resource Card
summary: Plan, diagnose, test, and defend an unfamiliar public-safety resource that must work from a moved folder and a web URL without a supplied recipe.
objectives: Transfer all foundation models to an unfamiliar high-consequence context.
Deliver a reproducible evidence packet with honest technical limits.

steps.title: Correct the mental model · resource card
steps.instruction: In the offline-and-online evacuation resource card, which statement about HTML is defensible?
steps.why: Separating system responsibilities makes a visible symptom traceable to the layer that can cause it. Working through correct the mental model narrows the offline-and-online evacuation resource card before the result is shown.

content.title: Correct the mental model — offline-and-online evacuation resource card
content.text: Commit to the claim that explains the offline-and-online evacuation resource card evidence without assigning work to the wrong layer.

hints: During offline-and-online evacuation resource card predict, identify which system chain boundary “Correct the mental model” asks about.
Compare every offline-and-online evacuation resource card option with the named “Correct the mental model” evidence during predict.
For offline-and-online evacuation resource card predict, reject claims that skip a required layer or invent unavailable evidence for “Correct the mental model.”

options.text: HTML is executable machine code that runs without an application.
HTML is document data interpreted by a browser process running with operating-system and hardware support.
HTML is a physical display protocol sent directly to the monitor.

steps.title: Rebuild project paths · resource card
steps.instruction: Within the offline-and-online evacuation resource card, reconstruct the project paths in causal order.
steps.why: Portable paths preserve the relationship between project resources when the containing folder moves. Ordering the offline-and-online evacuation resource card exposes its first unsupported causal handoff.

content.text: Do not order by vocabulary or visual position. Test whether each event creates the conditions required by the next event in the offline-and-online evacuation resource card.

hints: In the offline-and-online evacuation resource card sequence, locate the first event whose required input is not ready.
Separate offline-and-online evacuation resource card project paths events from later visible outcomes.
Rebuild the offline-and-online evacuation resource card sequence one causal handoff at a time.

options.text: Create one project root folder
Place the document and resource folders inside the root
Reference resources from the document with relative paths
Move the complete root and retest every resource

steps.title: Distinguish internet and web · resource card
steps.instruction: In the offline-and-online evacuation resource card, which relationship is accurate?
steps.why: Local-file access and web requests can display similar pages but fail at different boundaries. Working through distinguish internet and web narrows the offline-and-online evacuation resource card while you inspect the artifact.

content.title: Distinguish internet and web — offline-and-online evacuation resource card
content.text: Commit to the claim that explains the offline-and-online evacuation resource card evidence without assigning work to the wrong layer.

hints: During offline-and-online evacuation resource card inspect, identify which load journey boundary “Distinguish internet and web” asks about.
Compare every offline-and-online evacuation resource card option with the named “Distinguish internet and web” evidence during inspect.
For offline-and-online evacuation resource card inspect, reject claims that skip a required layer or invent unavailable evidence for “Distinguish internet and web.”

options.text: The web is the physical cables, while the internet is only the pages displayed in browsers.
The internet supplies network infrastructure; the web uses it to exchange linked resources through web protocols.
Internet and web are exact synonyms with no useful distinction.

stimulus.title: Two notice loads · offline-and-online evacuation resource card
stimulus.caption: Evidence from opening a saved file and visiting the published notice. Case: offline-and-online evacuation resource card; focus: distinguish internet and web.

steps.title: Interpret visible success · resource card
steps.instruction: In the offline-and-online evacuation resource card, the malformed page looks acceptable. What can that appearance prove?
steps.why: Source, the browser-built DOM, layout, and pixels are related stages rather than interchangeable evidence. Working through interpret visible success narrows the offline-and-online evacuation resource card as you connect the explanation to evidence.

content.text: A browser parses source into object models, applies error-recovery rules, derives accessibility information and styles, computes layout, and paints output. Source shows the input text; the DOM shows the current parsed structure; computed styles and layout show resolved presentation; pixels show only the final visual result. Apply this distinction during the offline-and-online evacuation resource card read task.

hints: During offline-and-online evacuation resource card read, identify which browser pipeline boundary “Interpret visible success” asks about.
Compare every offline-and-online evacuation resource card option with the named “Interpret visible success” evidence during read.
For offline-and-online evacuation resource card read, reject claims that skip a required layer or invent unavailable evidence for “Interpret visible success.”

options.text: That the source is conforming because browsers refuse to recover from errors.
Only that the browser produced plausible output; source and DOM evidence are still needed to judge structure.
That assistive technology receives the same pixels as a sighted user.

steps.title: Inspect an accessible name · resource card
steps.instruction: In the offline-and-online evacuation resource card, which evidence best verifies the current role and accessible name of a control?
steps.why: A deliberate panel choice turns browser inspection into evidence instead of random experimentation. Working through inspect an accessible name narrows the offline-and-online evacuation resource card while you defend the selected claim.

content.title: Inspect an accessible name — offline-and-online evacuation resource card
content.text: Commit to the claim that explains the offline-and-online evacuation resource card evidence without assigning work to the wrong layer.

hints: During offline-and-online evacuation resource card answer, identify which devtools evidence boundary “Inspect an accessible name” asks about.
Compare every offline-and-online evacuation resource card option with the named “Inspect an accessible name” evidence during answer.
For offline-and-online evacuation resource card answer, reject claims that skip a required layer or invent unavailable evidence for “Inspect an accessible name.”

options.text: Only the visible border color around the control.
The browser accessibility inspection for that control.
The Network response time for the HTML document.

steps.title: Record uncertainty · resource card
steps.instruction: In the offline-and-online evacuation resource card, two current sources disagree and the test is inconclusive. What is the professional response?
steps.why: Technical guidance is safer when authority, currency, scope, and browser evidence agree. Working through record uncertainty narrows the offline-and-online evacuation resource card while you inspect the artifact.

content.title: Record uncertainty — offline-and-online evacuation resource card
content.text: Commit to the claim that explains the offline-and-online evacuation resource card evidence without assigning work to the wrong layer.

hints: During offline-and-online evacuation resource card inspect, identify which source verification boundary “Record uncertainty” asks about.
Compare every offline-and-online evacuation resource card option with the named “Record uncertainty” evidence during inspect.
For offline-and-online evacuation resource card inspect, reject claims that skip a required layer or invent unavailable evidence for “Record uncertainty.”

options.text: Choose the shortest source and delete evidence of the disagreement.
Document the conflict, environment, and uncertainty; avoid presenting the decision as settled fact.
Present the preferred answer as universal because uncertainty reduces confidence.

stimulus.title: Conflicting guidance · offline-and-online evacuation resource card
stimulus.caption: Three sources returned for the same browser-behavior question. Case: offline-and-online evacuation resource card; focus: record uncertainty.

lines.label: test
lines.text: reduced case reproduces in current browser

steps.title: Assign the responsibilities · resource card
steps.instruction: In the offline-and-online evacuation resource card, which account includes every required layer?
steps.why: Separating system responsibilities makes a visible symptom traceable to the layer that can cause it. Working through assign the responsibilities narrows the offline-and-online evacuation resource card before the result is shown.

content.title: Assign the responsibilities — offline-and-online evacuation resource card
content.text: Commit to the claim that explains the offline-and-online evacuation resource card evidence without assigning work to the wrong layer.

Compare every offline-and-online evacuation resource card option with the named “Assign the responsibilities” evidence during predict.
For offline-and-online evacuation resource card predict, reject claims that skip a required layer or invent unavailable evidence for “Assign the responsibilities.”

options.text: The HTML file wakes the monitor and directly instructs it which characters to illuminate.
Input reaches the operating system, which reads data for the browser to process before graphics and display hardware present pixels.
The browser performs input, storage access, graphics processing, and display output without operating-system or hardware services.

steps.title: Write the evidence note · resource card
steps.instruction: Write a concise case note for the offline-and-online evacuation resource card. Explain the mechanism, cite observed evidence, and reject one plausible alternative.
steps.why: Explaining the offline-and-online evacuation resource card from memory exposes gaps that selected answers can hide. Cite the mechanism and its evidence.

content.title: Transfer brief
content.text: A teammate must be able to reproduce your conclusion without seeing the earlier answer choices. Name evidence and limits, not only the final verdict.

hints: Start the offline-and-online evacuation resource card case note with the earliest observed event.
Use these offline-and-online evacuation resource card technical anchors where they fit: operating system, browser, display, folder, relative path.
Close the offline-and-online evacuation resource card note by naming one alternative and the evidence that rules it out.

steps.title: Transfer Record uncertainty with new evidence · resource card
steps.instruction: Using the new evidence in the offline-and-online evacuation resource card transfer round, two current sources disagree and the test is inconclusive. What is the professional response?
steps.why: Technical guidance is safer when authority, currency, scope, and browser evidence agree. Working through record uncertainty narrows the offline-and-online evacuation resource card transfer round as you connect the explanation to evidence.

content.text: A useful technical question names the exact behavior and environment. Primary specifications define the platform; official documentation explains it; compatibility data narrows support; and a reduced browser test verifies the local claim. Search rank, confident tone, and copied snippets are not authority. Apply this distinction during the offline-and-online evacuation resource card transfer round read task.

hints: During offline-and-online evacuation resource card transfer round read, identify which source verification boundary “Record uncertainty” asks about.
Compare every offline-and-online evacuation resource card transfer round option with the named “Record uncertainty” evidence during read.
For offline-and-online evacuation resource card transfer round read, reject claims that skip a required layer or invent unavailable evidence for “Record uncertainty.”

options.text: Applied to the offline-and-online evacuation resource card transfer round read: choose the shortest source and delete evidence of the disagreement.
Applied to the offline-and-online evacuation resource card transfer round read: document the conflict, environment, and uncertainty; avoid presenting the decision as settled fact.
Applied to the offline-and-online evacuation resource card transfer round read: present the preferred answer as universal because uncertainty reduces confidence.
